market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
articles.description: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.

articles.title: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving company amid revenue slowdown
articles.description: Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova is leaving the firm after more than five years, as the trading platform navigates a sharp decline in crypto revenue and works to lessen its dependence on digital asset market cycles.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
articles.description: Bitcoin sold off to $76,000, giving bears an opportunity to reclaim control of the crypto market. Meanwhile, altcoins like HYPE charted new highs.

articles.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce counters views that crypto rule will foster synthetic tokens
articles.description: Hester Peirce, the commissioner behind the SEC's Crypto Task Force, made statements on the now-delayed proposal, perhaps tamping down mistaken beliefs.

articles.title: Why Minnesota is empowering local banks to fight Wall Street for crypto revenue
articles.description: A local banker told CoinDesk that in light of Wall Street’s aggressive push into the crypto industry, Minnesota's financial institutions could not afford to remain on the sidelines.

articles.title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
articles.description: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

articles.title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
articles.description: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.

articles.title: Tom Emmer brushes off law enforcement concerns over Clarity Act
articles.description: House Majority Whip Tom Emmer said concerns from law enforcement groups about crypto developer protections are being overstated.

articles.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
articles.description: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

articles.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
articles.description: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

articles.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
articles.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
articles.description: Institutional crypto adoption accelerates as Tether expands Bitcoin holdings, miners pivot to AI and Polymarket joins Nasdaq amid $1 billion fund outflows.

articles.title: 6,000 個外星世界盡收眼底，NASA 釋出 TESS 迄今最完整「系外行星全天全景圖」
articles.description: NASA 的凌日系外行星巡天衛星（Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite， […]

articles.title: 貓咪踩鍵盤不再崩潰！Mac 應用程式 Cats Lock 一鍵鎖定保平安
articles.description: 貓奴在家工作才轉身一秒，皇上就踩爛鍵盤「代留言」，甚至誤刪重要檔案。獨立開發者 Todd Alexander  […]

articles.title: Bitcoin price falls under $77K as Dow Jones hits new all-time highs
articles.description: Bitcoin headed lower as Wall Street trading began with new record highs for the Dow Jones, while traders warned of weak US demand.

articles.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
articles.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

articles.title: Congress hits Polymarket and Kalshi with a massive insider trading probe
articles.description: Rep. James Comer is demanding internal records from the prediction market CEOs, warning that government employees could be using classified information to make “huge profits”.

articles.title: The agentic CFO in your pocket
articles.description: Chalom explains that retail investors have never had the opportunity to access and manage their own digital treasury desk. Until now.

articles.title: NYSE owner ICE to launch oil-linked futures with OKX
articles.description: ICE and OKX plan to launch oil-linked perpetual futures based on Brent and WTI benchmarks, bringing crypto derivatives further into traditional energy markets under licensing restrictions.

articles.title: Trump Mobile confirms it exposed customers’ personal data, including phone numbers and home addresses
articles.description: President Trump’s branded cell phone maker and cell provider said the exposure was linked to a third-party platform and was evaluating whether it needs to notify customers.
